codeReview.summary: Implementation satisfies the feature contract: OUTREACH_PHONE is now centralized via _outreach_phone() and used by both _fallback_template() and build_outreach_prompt() CTA text; .env.example includes OUTREACH_PHONE; and tests cover env-set, env-unset fallback, and prompt CTA inclusion.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker handoff reported a known pre-existing Vite chunk-size warning as a discovered issue, which conflicts with mission AGENTS guidance.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Mission AGENTS.md says known pre-existing issues (including Vite chunk-size warning) should not be reported as discovered issues (section 'Known Pre-Existing Issues'). Handoff 2026-03-30T19-02-36-218Z__configurable-outreach-phone__3ef8d974-3d46-4a99-9955-8d72dfeb39fa.json includes it in handoff.discoveredIssues[0].

sharedStateObservations.observation: python-backend skill's mandatory manual-verification step appears over-prescriptive for deterministic, pure string-rendering changes that are fully covered by focused unit tests.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: python-backend SKILL.md Work Procedure step 6 requires manual verification; handoff skillFeedback marks followedProcedure=false because the worker skipped ad-hoc manual checks and relied on targeted unit tests plus compile/build validation for this env-var interpolation change.

summary: Reviewed feature configurable-outreach-phone using feature metadata, handoff, transcript skeleton, commit diff, and shared-state docs. The code changes and tests meet the stated requirements with no blocking or non-blocking code defects; review passes.
